data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Story DD Coverage
This task is responsible for satisfying all story done definitions:
- DD1: Task creates test file; all 4 tests fail RED before any implementation
- DD2: AC includes recording RED result as ticket comment
- DD3a: test_file_impact_puts_to_property_endpoint asserts acli_client.set_issue_property called with (jira_key, "dso.file_impact", file_impact_list)
- DD3b: test_file_impact_credentials_passed_to_client verifies dispatcher calls set_issue_property; HTTP Authorization header injection is AcliClient implementation concern (unit-tested in implementation story C/D)
- DD3c: test_file_impact_posts_uuid_marker_comment asserts UUID marker in comment body AND dedup suppresses second post (call_count == 1)
- DD3d: test_file_impact_emits_bridge_alert_on_put_failure asserts BRIDGE_ALERT file ending in '-BRIDGE_ALERT.json' with data.reason == "FILE_IMPACT_SYNC_FAILED"

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py | CREATE |
| .test-index | MODIFY |

## Implementation Approach
Use process_events() + tmp_path .tickets-tracker + MagicMock acli_client. Pattern from tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_integration.py.

## Test Fixture Setup (each test)
1. tmp_path / "tkt-test" ticket dir
2. Write CREATE event (env_id=OTHER_ENV_ID)
3. Write SYNC event (bridge_env_id=BRIDGE_ENV_ID, jira_key="DSO-42")
4. Write FILE_IMPACT event (data.file_impact=[{"path": "src/foo.py", "reason": "modified"}])
5. MagicMock acli_client
6. Call process_events(tickets_dir=str(tmp_path), acli_client=mock_acli, bridge_env_id=BRIDGE_ENV_ID)

## Test Functions (all fail RED — no FILE_IMPACT branch in process_outbound dispatcher)

### test_file_impact_puts_to_property_endpoint
Given: CREATE+SYNC+FILE_IMPACT events in tmp dir
When: process_events() runs
Then: mock_acli.set_issue_property.assert_called_once_with("DSO-42", "dso.file_impact", [{"path": "src/foo.py", "reason": "modified"}])

### test_file_impact_credentials_passed_to_client
Given: same setup
When: process_events() runs
Then: mock_acli.set_issue_property.assert_called_once()
# DD3b: HTTP Authorization header injection is AcliClient implementation concern;
# this test verifies dispatcher invokes set_issue_property (credential transport
# unit-tested in AcliClient tests in implementation story C/D).

### test_file_impact_posts_uuid_marker_comment
Given: same setup
When: process_events() runs
Then:
  - assert mock_acli.add_comment.called
  - body = mock_acli.add_comment.call_args.args[1]
  - assert re.search(r'[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}', body)
  - Write same FILE_IMPACT event again; re-call process_events()
  - assert mock_acli.add_comment.call_count == 1  (dedup suppresses duplicate)

### test_file_impact_emits_bridge_alert_on_put_failure
Given: same setup, AND mock_acli.set_issue_property.side_effect = Exception("Jira PUT failed")
When: process_events() runs
Then:
  - assert any(f.name.endswith('-BRIDGE_ALERT.json') for f in (tmp_path / "tkt-test").iterdir())
  - load the matching file; assert json.loads(content)["data"]["reason"] == "FILE_IMPACT_SYNC_FAILED"

## .test-index Update
Extend bridge-outbound.py line to include:
  tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py [test_file_impact_puts_to_property_endpoint]
(RED marker for first failing test)

## After Task Completion
Run: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py -x
Confirm non-zero exit (RED), then record:
  .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment b9ac-2459 "RED confirmed: <test output summary>"

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 4 test functions exist in tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py
  Verify: [ $(grep -c 'def test_' tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py) -eq 4 ]
- [ ] Tests fail RED
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py; [ $? -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for bridge-outbound.py -> new test file
  Verify: grep 'test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration' .test-index
- [ ] RED result recorded as ticket comment
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show b9ac-2459 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert any('RED confirmed' in c.get('body','') for c in d.get('comments',[])), 'No RED confirmed comment'"
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes
  Verify: ruff format --check tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py
- [ ] DD3b scoped assertion: test_file_impact_credentials_passed_to_client verifies dispatcher invokes set_issue_property; HTTP Authorization header injection is AcliClient implementation concern (unit-tested in AcliClient tests in implementation story C/D, not at this integration layer)
  Verify: grep 'credentials_passed_to_client' tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py
- [ ] DD3c dedup assertion present
  Verify: grep 'call_count == 1' tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py
- [ ] DD3d BRIDGE_ALERT file pattern assertion uses endswith convention
  Verify: grep 'BRIDGE_ALERT.json' tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_file_impact_integration.py

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
data.title: Write failing RED integration tests for FILE_IMPACT bridge outbound path (b9ac-2459)
